note: Corrected role mapping: primary brand is TEAL (--color-bravo #4c868f), not rust. Rust (--color-charlie) is link-hover only. Dark charcoal (--color-echo) is ink AND hero/footer background. The utility class names (.bg-orange, .bg-brown) are legacy and misleading.

--color-alpha.role: Secondary accent — purple. News module heading color, active pagination dot, slider strong text.

--color-bravo.role: PRIMARY brand — teal. Sidebar background, all .btn and form buttons, active menu item, pagination current, rich-media bullet color, breadcrumbs separator.

--color-charlie.role: Link hover / form-focus accent — rust. Used on a:hover/focus and input focus borders ONLY. Not a section or button color.

--color-charlie-hover.role: Declared but unused in shipped CSS.

--color-delta.role: Light gray — thin rule beside uppercase section headings (heading__separator:after), carousel disabled state, light surface.

--color-echo.role: Charcoal — body text AND dark surfaces: hero bg, site-footer bg, mobile-menu content wrapper, the hamburger toggle nub, sub-menu dropdown bg.

--color-foxtrot.role: White — body background and text on dark surfaces.

--color-golf.role: Pure black — heading__separator label color, inactive pagination dot.

--color-hotel.role: Blue-violet — featured card post-date accent only.

display_headings.notes: Slab-serif. Applied to h1-h6 globally via `h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6{font-family:rockwell}`. Also used for ordered-list counters. System-installed Rockwell only — no @font-face. Hero slide titles reach 8rem-20rem; section-body headings stay 2.4-4rem. Fallback stack: 'Rockwell','Rockwell Std','Roboto Slab',serif.

section_label.notes: This is the `.heading__separator` — the small uppercase label with a flex-grown gray rule to its right. It is NOT a display heading. Visible on the home page as 'ABOUT US', 'NEWS', 'GET TO KNOW OUR COMMUNITY', 'STAY CONNECTED'.

sidebar.desktop: 72-96px fixed left column. Flex column. Top child = dark charcoal hamburger nub (.bg-darkgray, ~8rem tall). Bottom child = teal strip with vertical SVG logo reading 'Plymouth Brethren Christian Church'. Sticky, z-index 1000.
sidebar.mobile: Full-width horizontal bar at top. Hamburger left, horizontal logo right.

hero.backdrop: Dark charcoal (--color-echo). Vue-hydrated slider <vue id="55"> — server HTML ships empty; Vue fetches slides client-side. Pattern: left column with big white serif title + subcopy + teal CTA link + pagination dots; right column circle-clipped photograph with teal curved mask.

section_label_pattern.css: .heading__separator { font:700 1.6rem/1 'Open Sans',sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; display:flex; align-items:center; color:#000 } .heading__separator:after { content:''; flex-grow:1; height:2px; background:#dfe1e1; margin-left:4rem }
section_label_pattern.note: NOT centered, NOT in Rockwell, NOT rust. Small sans-serif label with a long gray line to its right. Our previous build centered it with a short rust underline — wrong.

button.hover: Still teal, some variants use --color-bravo darken

platform.frontend_framework: Vue 2 (scoped CSS — data-v-* attributes; hero is a Vue component hydrated client-side)
